plot outline: In a twilight world of international espionage, an unnamed CIA operative, known as The Protagonist, is recruited by a mysterious organization called Tenet to participate in a global assignment that unfolds beyond real time. The mission: prevent Andrei Sator, a renegade Russian oligarch with precognition abilities, from starting World War III. The Protagonist will soon master the art of "time inversion" as a way of countering the threat that is to come.
title: Tenet

visual effects.name: Bala Venkata Manikanta Arun Kumar Yagati

other companies.name: Above the Line Set Assistance & Security
